items.description: Role metadata — platforms Ubuntu >= 18.04, CentOS >= 7.0; no external cookbook dependencies
items.notes: meta/main.yml already exists and is complete (written by prior step). Skipped overwrite.

items.description: Role default variables — all hardcoded values from recipe (app path, git repo, port, DB credentials, project name, API version)
items.notes: Created defaults/main.yml with all role variables: fastapi_app_dir, git repo/branch, app entrypoint, bind host, port, api_version, system packages list, service name, env file settings, and systemd unit file settings.

items.description: Handlers — systemd daemon-reload triggered when fastapi-tutorial.service unit file changes
items.notes: Created handlers for 'Reload systemd daemon' and 'Restart fastapi-tutorial', both using ansible.builtin.systemd.

items.description: Main tasks entry point — orchestrates all deployment steps: packages, directory, git clone, venv, pip install, PostgreSQL, .env file, systemd unit, service enable/start
items.notes: Full task file created: system packages, app dir, git clone, venv, pip install, PostgreSQL service/user/db/privs via community.postgresql, env template, systemd unit template, service enable/start. Persistent R301 warnings are due to community.postgresql not being installed in lint environment — file is correctly written.

items.description: Jinja2 template for /opt/fastapi-tutorial/.env — PROJECT_NAME, API_VERSION, DATABASE_URL; sourced from inline heredoc in recipe; credentials must be vaulted
items.notes: Created Jinja2 template using AAP credential variables: db_username, db_password, db_host, db_name. api_version variable from defaults.

items.description: Jinja2 template for /etc/systemd/system/fastapi-tutorial.service — uvicorn ExecStart on port 8000, After=network.target postgresql.service; sourced from inline heredoc in recipe
items.notes: Created Jinja2 template for systemd unit file using role variables for app dir, entrypoint, bind host, and port.

items.description: community.postgresql collection — provides postgresql_user and postgresql_db modules for idempotent PostgreSQL user and database provisioning; replaces raw sudo -u postgres psql shell hacks
items.notes: Created requirements.yml with community.postgresql collection (no pinned version — AAP Private Hub manages versioning).

items.description: Molecule scenario configuration — delegated driver, local connection, no docker/podman
Molecule converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (app dir, venv, .env, systemd unit); does NOT use include_role
items.notes: Creates /tmp/molecule_test/ directory tree mirroring the role's filesystem state: app dir, app/main.py, requirements.txt, venv/bin/python3, venv/bin/uvicorn stubs, .env config file (mode 0644), and fastapi-tutorial.service unit file (mode 0644). No become, no include_role, no package installs — pure file/directory creation under /tmp/molecule_test/.

items.description: Molecule verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths for app dir, venv/bin/uvicorn, .env content, systemd unit file, PostgreSQL service, port 8000 listener
items.notes: Translates all pre-flight checks into Ansible assertions. Container-safe checks (stat+assert, slurp+assert) verify: app dir, requirements.txt, app/main.py, venv dir, venv/bin/python3, venv/bin/uvicorn, .env content (PROJECT_NAME, API_VERSION, DATABASE_URL), and systemd unit file content (ExecStart, After=, WorkingDirectory, Restart, WantedBy). Service, port, and HTTP checks tagged molecule-notest.

items.description: Molecule no-op instance create stub — delegated driver requires explicit create/destroy playbooks
Molecule no-op instance destroy stub — delegated driver requires explicit create/destroy playbooks
